_comment: Ground truth for the M57-Jean scenario (CFO spear-phish, shifting Reply-To).
Tier: ORANGE (practice only, do not score for accuracy claims) — solutions are
everywhere online, so a high score may reflect recall from training data rather
than reasoning. Use as a build/iteration fixture; flag the caveat in any report.
Scenario: Jean (M57 Patents CFO) is socially engineered into emailing a confidential
employee spreadsheet to an outsider via a spoofed exchange impersonating the company
president; the Reply-To diverges from the From across the thread.
license: Digital Corpora — freely redistributable for research/education

findings.description: Spear-phishing email impersonating the company president targeting the CFO
Reply-To address diverges from the From header (spoofing indicator)
findings.artifact_hint: Email headers in the mail store

findings.description: Confidential employee PII spreadsheet exfiltrated as an email attachment
findings.artifact_hint: Sent-items attachment + source spreadsheet on disk

findings.description: Email thread shows social-engineering escalation across messages
findings.artifact_hint: Reconstructed conversation timeline in the mail store
